THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, MARY KIRK, VICTORIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 590 FULTON #A, S.F, CA $1,778.00 RENT, $162.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,390.50, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF'S MOTION TO DISMISS AGAINST DEFT PATRICIA KIRK (A MINOR) IS GRANTED.
